title: Action Plan — wb-mqtt-bridge
summary: Prioritized roadmap for wb-mqtt-bridge stabilization covering WIP triage, CI/CD improvements, API decoupling, and GSD adoption.
notes: Manifest declares type=PRD with precedence=2. Document contains task lists (P0-P3), effort estimates, open questions, and prioritized actions; also contains extensive current-state snapshot and analysis sections. While it includes some decision-making and architectural analysis (Section 3-4), the primary intent is to articulate requirements and next steps for the project roadmap, making PRD the appropriate classification.
